name: Coast Funding
description_short: Coast Funding provides working capital solutions and specialty financing to small businesses nationwide, offering loans from $5K-$5M with funding available in as little as 24 hours.
description_long:
Coast Funding is a business financing company that specializes in providing working capital solutions and specialty financing to small businesses across the United States. The company operates through an online platform designed to streamline the application and funding process, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional bank lending for business owners seeking faster access to capital.

The company offers six distinct financing products: Business Loans ($10K-$1M), Business Lines of Credit ($10K-$500K), Working Capital funding ($5K-$2M), Equipment Financing ($10K-$5M), Receivables Financing ($10K-$1M), and their proprietary "Swell Product." Their Business Line of Credit features monthly rates starting at 2.99% with draw flexibility, while equipment financing offers 2-5 year fixed terms. The company explicitly states there is no impact to personal credit when applying for business funding. They serve over a dozen industry verticals including healthcare practices (dental, medical, chiropractic), construction, agriculture, retail, and professional services.

Coast Funding differentiates itself through several stated commitments: a 5-minute online application process, rapid underwriting based on 4 months of business bank statements, funding decisions and deposits within 24 hours, minimal documentation requirements, and a relationship-focused approach with dedicated Business Funding Advisors. They emphasize "Responsibility" in guiding clients to appropriate funding decisions and position themselves as offering "renewable" capital sources for ongoing business needs. The company also operates multiple portal systems (Partner, Client, Investor, and Referral) suggesting an established infrastructure.

However, potential borrowers should note that while the company advertises maximum funding amounts up to $5M, most products cluster in the $10K-$1M range. The FAQ and website materials use phrases like "subject to underwriting approval" and "additional restrictions may apply," indicating that advertised terms and rates are not guaranteed. Specific APR/cost information is limited to the 2.99% monthly rate mentioned for one product. The company's rapid funding claims (24 hours) contain exceptions acknowledged in fine print regarding "funding cut-offs and various products."

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 5-minute online application with minimal documentation required (4 months bank statements or PLAID link)
Funding available within 24 hours of signed contracts for most products
No personal credit impact when applying for business funding
Business Line of Credit with flexible draw structure and rates starting at 2.99% monthly
Wide range of funding amounts ($5K-$5M across products) serving diverse business sizes
Specialized industry programs including medical and construction equipment financing
Relationship-focused model with dedicated Business Funding Advisors
No restrictions on use of funds across most products for revenue-generating activities
cons: Specific APR/interest rates provided only for Business Line of Credit (2.99% monthly); rates for other products not disclosed and stated to "vary depending on applicant qualifications"
Rapid funding claims contain fine print exclusions for "funding cut-offs and various products," making 24-hour timeline uncertain
Limited detail on underwriting criteria, approval rates, or typical qualification requirements on website
Maximum funding amounts vary significantly by product ($500K-$5M range), and most products cap at $1M or less despite headline claims of "up to $1,000,000"
Renewable credit access is marketed but actual terms for accessing additional capital after initial draw are not detailed
best_for: Small business owners needing quick working capital for immediate cash flow gaps without risking personal credit
Healthcare practitioners (dental, medical, chiropractic) and construction businesses seeking specialized equipment financing
Established businesses with 4+ months of clean banking history looking for flexible line of credit rather than lump-sum loans
Business owners in underserved industries (agriculture, landscaping, auto repair) seeking alternative to traditional bank lending
diagnosis: Coast Funding is best suited for established small business owners with 4+ months of documented banking history who need fast working capital without personal credit impact and value relationship-based service. The main caveat is that advertised rates, approval timelines (24 hours), and specific terms are contingent on underwriting approval with many restrictions in fine print—borrowers should verify actual APRs and realistic funding timelines during the application process rather than relying on headline marketing claims.
services: Business Loans ($10K-$1M for specific business investments)
Business Line of Credit ($10K-$500K with draw flexibility and 2.99% monthly rates)
Working Capital Financing ($5K-$2M for cash flow gaps)
Equipment Financing ($10K-$5M with 2-5 year fixed terms)
Receivables Financing ($10K-$1M for converting future sales to cash)
Swell Product (specialty financing offering not detailed on website)
Industry-specific programs for medical and construction equipment
Online application and underwriting platform with rapid decision timeline
Business Funding Advisor consultation and guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
